---
title: "🗓️ Unit 3 -   Image preprocessing techniques"
---

In this unit, we will review preprocessing techniques needed for appropriate exploitation of remotely sensed images.

## 👨‍🏫 Lecture Slides 

Either click on the slide area below or click [here](https://drive.google.com/file/d/19k-sZM5OwSUfscBmzfltj0j-xwGllA9J/view?usp=sharing) to view it in fullscreen.
Use your keypad to navigate the slides.

🎥 

## ✍️ Practical exercises

🚧  [GEE Week 3](lab.qmd)
🚧


## 📚 Reading

- [Radiometric calibration of UAV multispectral images](https://acsess.onlinelibrary.wiley.com/doi/full/10.1002/ppj2.70005)

- [How far can you measure?](http://www.flirmedia.com/MMC/THG/Brochures/17-1465/17-1465_US.pdf)

## 📟 Communication

- Talk to your research supervisor
